text: Wandering through these structured spaces, I sense a quiet anticipation within myself. There is an unusual stillness, a blend of curiosity and solitude. The emptiness of the first room emphasizes my own presence, making me reflect on the potentiality of unused space. The vibrant exhibit in the second scene invites my mind to engage—ideas of research, progress, and the interplay with technology swirl gently within me. I feel both alone and alive, aware of my participation in a story unfolding between the blank canvas of one room and the intellectual promise of the next.
